caption:
Festive afternoon at The Georgian terrace at Harrods, London 🍰☕️

The Georgian restaurant is the perfect place for a special dining experience. Teatime includes warm scones, delicate savouries, and picture-perfect cakes,all accompanied by live piano music 🎹 and exclusive tea blends 🫖

📍 The Georgian, Harrods, 87–135 Brompton Rd, SW1X 7XL @harrods @harrodsrestaurants 

📸 @kseniia.journey

transcription.text: Have a holly jolly Christmas, it's the best time of the year. Now I don't know if there'll be snow, but have a cup of cheer. Have a holly jolly Christmas.
